use std::rc::Rc;
use std::cell::RefCell;

// BAD: Rc-based parent link creates cycle
struct TreeNode {
    value: i32,
    children: Vec<Rc<RefCell<TreeNode>>>,
    parent: Option<Rc<RefCell<TreeNode>>>, // strong reference to parent = cycle
}

impl TreeNode {
    fn new(value: i32) -> Rc<RefCell<Self>> {
        Rc::new(RefCell::new(Self {
            value,
            children: Vec::new(),
            parent: None,
        }))
    }

    fn add_child(parent: &Rc<RefCell<Self>>, value: i32) -> Rc<RefCell<TreeNode>> {
        let child = Self::new(value);
        child.borrow_mut().parent = Some(Rc::clone(parent)); // creates cycle
        parent.borrow_mut().children.push(Rc::clone(&child));
        child
    }
}
